parser_strategy.name: api_response_extractor
parser_strategy.description: IKEA exposes a public search API at sik.search.blue.cdtapps.com that returns structured product JSON. The API accepts POST requests with a JSON body specifying the category ID and pagination window. Products are returned in results[0].items[].product with full pricing, images, and metadata.
parser_strategy.input: JSON API response from IKEA search endpoint
decode_steps: POST to https://sik.search.blue.cdtapps.com/gb/en/search?c=listaf&v=20250507 with category ID in searchParameters.input
For each item, extract product sub-object

pagination_strategy.notes: Pagination is controlled via the window.offset and window.size fields in the POST body. Total items can be determined from the filters or by paginating until empty results.

title.notes: Product name (e.g. 'GLOSTAD'). IKEA uses short names, not descriptive titles.

highest_price.notes: Current price as a float (e.g. 150.0). Currency is in salesPrice.currencyCode.

currency.notes: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. 'GBP'). Determined by the locale in the API URL.

color.notes: First color name from the colors array (e.g. 'grey'). Multiple colors may be available.

size.missing_reason: Size/dimensions are not available in the listing API response. Available on product detail pages.

description.notes: Product type description (e.g. '3-seat sofa'). Full descriptions are on detail pages.

image_url.notes: Direct URL to the main product image. May need .jpg extension appended.

product_url.notes: Full URL to the product detail page (e.g. 'https://www.ikea.com/gb/en/p/glostad-3-seat-sofa-...')

category_level_1.notes: Can be derived from typeName or the category ID used in the search query.

category_level_2.missing_reason: Sub-category is not available in the listing API response.

implementation_notes: IKEA's search API at sik.search.blue.cdtapps.com is publicly accessible and returns structured product JSON. No authentication required. The API supports pagination via offset/size in the POST body. Category IDs can be found in the URL path (e.g. 'fu003' for sofas). The API also returns filter metadata which can be used for faceted navigation. Locale is part of the URL path (e.g. 'gb/en' for UK English).
